creator: xelalex_maker@web.de
text:
(In reply to vladimir.chukharev from comment #23)

I just found out that diff can produce ed-scripts, and the patch could have been applied using

{ cat patch; echo w } | ed - geogebra

However, the new patch replacing the script altogether is probably the better way to go.

I cannot test it right now, as I do not build packages, myself, but when it shows up in Quarterly, I'll give it a try.

Thanks!
